solution_latex: Use $i^2=-1$: real part $-4\cdot -3-2\cdot 1=10$ and imaginary part $-4\cdot 1+2\cdot -3=-10$.
The conjugate keeps the real part and changes the sign of the imaginary part, giving $-3-3i$.

The conjugate keeps the real part and changes the sign of the imaginary part, giving $-1-5i$.
